name: general-civil-online-harassment-and-defamation
userInput: My ex-partner has been posting lies about me on social media. This is defamation. They have also been sending repeated messages and engaging in harassment for the past two months. I want to stop them and get compensation for the damage to my reputation and the distress this has caused.

caseData.issue: Defamation via social media posts containing false statements, combined with a course of conduct amounting to harassment through repeated messages and unwanted contact over two months.
caseData.impact: Damage to reputation in local community; ongoing distress and anxiety caused by the harassment; impact on employment and personal relationships.
caseData.remedy: Injunction to stop them posting and messaging; compensation for reputational damage and distress.
